subcodes.title: Words to George Winterburn et al, spoken on 1904-02-08
subcodes.first_line: There is no real pleasure in the world and no real happiness.... I wish for the happiness and prosperity of the believers even in this material world,
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty
